text: Do you want to learn Claude Code? Because if you don't know what it is yet — you need to. 99% of the content out there about Claude is made for coders and marketers. What about everyone else? So I want to ask you directly — what do you actually want to learn about Claude? What would make your life easier right now? Drop a YES in the comments, send me a DM, or visit hephosnexa.com. Tell me what you want — and I'll make it for you.
